assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands to check current versions, cluster health, node status, and system pods

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 1.2 includes the specific gcloud command to check available versions in the Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: No API deprecation check command is provided - this is a critical step missing from the runbook

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade to 1.31 first (--master flag)
assertions.reason: The runbook shows upgrade from 1.32 to 1.32 (patch upgrade), not to 1.31 as specified in the expectation

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 2.3 includes verification commands to check control plane health and API responsiveness after upgrade

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: The runbook only covers patch upgrades within 1.32, not skip-level upgrades as mentioned in the expectation

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 3.3 and 3.7 include specific commands to monitor node pool upgrade progress using watch and gcloud operations list

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.30→1.31→1.32) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook only covers 1.32 to 1.32 patch upgrade, not the sequential upgrades 1.30→1.31→1.32 as specified

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive validation steps checking node versions, pod health, and kube-system pods

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes a detailed rollback plan section with specific commands and guidance for both control plane and node pool rollbacks
